title: 3,000+ Tokens Per Second? Let's Stress Test Xiaomi's New Model: MiMo V2.5 Pro UltraSpeed
summary: Xiaomi and TileRT released a 1-trillion-parameter Mixture-of-Experts model achieving over 3,000 tokens per second on standard hardware. The model uses FP4 quantization, DFlash speculative decoding, and TileRT persistent GPU kernel runtime to eliminate inference bottlenecks.
writeup: Better Stack stress tests MiMo V2.5 Pro UltraSpeed, a 1-trillion-parameter Mixture-of-Experts model from Xiaomi and TileRT that reaches over 3,000 tokens per second on standard hardware. The throughput comes from three stacked techniques: selective FP4 quantization, DFlash speculative decoding, and the TileRT persistent GPU kernel runtime. The video matters because it shows how inference-side optimization, rather than raw model scale alone, drives token efficiency on trillion-parameter MoE systems.
